title: Reposition public repository as contract-only
summary: Remove public implementation/runtime assets, rewrite the public repository story, preserve declarative contract assets, and record the migration boundary.
planned_changes: Remove source, tests, scripts, workflow automation, tool implementations, server implementations, implementation manifests, and executable fixture scripts; rewrite README and public boundary docs; add migration and traceability records.
out_of_scope: creating generated SDKs or runtime packages
verification_plan: Inspect repository files for forbidden extensions, runnable automation, stale command documentation, schema parse errors, and preserved declarative contract assets.
completion_notes: The public repository now contains contracts and declarative examples only; implementation work belongs in consuming repositories.
